column1: # Asymptote bundled-dylib license registry -- single source of truth.
# Tab-separated. Lines beginning with # and blank lines are ignored.
# Within a field, ":" separates list items.
#   keys             dylib-derived keys for this library. Derive a key from a
#                    dylib filename by stripping the leading "lib", the trailing
#                    libSPIRV.16.dylib->spirv). A library that ships as several
#                    dylibs lists all their keys (e.g. glslang also ships libSPIRV).
#   spdx             SPDX-style expression (summary; the file is authoritative)
#   dylib_globs      glob(s) used at runtime to detect the library in ./lib
#   upstream_url     upstream project URL (used in warnings and docs)

column3: BSD-3-Clause AND BSD-2-Clause AND MIT AND Apache-2.0 AND GPL-3.0-or-later WITH Bison-exception-2.2
